FAQs

  1. How do I contact Town staff?
  2. When does the Town sweep my street?
  3. See full list of Frequently Asked Questions
  4. What hours are Town departments open?
/FAQ.aspx

  1. Our Mission
    The mission of the Town of Corte Madera is to enhance our community's health, safety, and quality of life by serving our residents and businesses through proactive, responsive, and inclusive leadership. We strive to serve our community with courtesy, transparency, and equity. We work to improve the beauty, infrastructure and character of our town in a responsible way that ensures a sustainable, prosperous, and just future for all of Corte Madera. Learn about our values and how we strive to create a new organizational culture.

  1. Accessibility
  1. Copyright Notices
  1. Privacy Policy
  1. Site Map
  1. Contact Us
/QuickLinks.aspx
Government Websites by CivicPlus®

  1. OPEN HOURS FOR TOWN DEPARTMENTS

    Administration and Finance
    Monday through Thursday from 8:30AM to 4:00PM and Fridays from 8:30AM to 12PM.

    Community Development (Planning and Building Divisions)
    Monday through Thursday from 8:30AM to 4:00PM and Fridays from 8:30AM to 12PM.

    Parks and Recreation 
    Monday through Friday 9AM to 4PM.

    Public Works and Sanitary District No. 2
    General Public Hours: Monday through Thursday from 8:30AM to 4:00PM (closed on Fridays) 
    Engineering Support & Technical Review of Public Works and Sanitary District No. 2 Permits (sewer, encroachment, floodplain, etc.): Tuesdays and Thursdays between 8:30AM to 3:30PM.
